description: Call to Arms Patch 8 (30 June 2021) — New Statue in Conquerors' Hall, Mobile Improvements and Fixes, Marketplace Mail Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Faction Warfare Changes, Other Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: New Statue in Conquerors' Hall

items.text: Congratulations to SUN, winners of Guild Season 12! Check out their brand-new statue at the entrance to Conquerors' Hall in the Royal Cities. The statue also includes guild logos of the second and third place winners, MudHouse and MAHARLIKA. Check out the new statue, visit the hall, and pay your respects to all the past winners!
Additionally, Season 12 statue items can now be placed as furniture.

sections.searchable_text: New Statue in Conquerors' Hall Congratulations to SUN, winners of Guild Season 12! Check out their brand-new statue at the entrance to Conquerors' Hall in the Royal Cities. The statue also includes guild logos of the second and third place winners, MudHouse and MAHARLIKA. Check out the new statue, visit the hall, and pay your respects to all the past winners! Additionally, Season 12 statue items can now be placed as furniture.

sections.heading: Mobile Improvements and Fixes

items.text: Added on-press tooltips for Hideouts to the zone map
The option to open zoom camera with double-tap is now off by default

sections.searchable_text: Mobile Improvements and Fixes Added on-press tooltips for Hideouts to the zone map The option to open zoom camera with double-tap is now off by default

sections.heading: Marketplace Mail Changes

items.text: Notifications are now only sent when a Buy or Sell Order is completely fulfilled or expires
These mails contain a summary of all relevant transactions, and notifications are no longer sent for every single transaction

sections.searchable_text: Marketplace Mail Changes Notifications are now only sent when a Buy or Sell Order is completely fulfilled or expires These mails contain a summary of all relevant transactions, and notifications are no longer sent for every single transaction

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Axes

items.text: Adrenaline Boost (all Axes)

subitems.text: Ability damage (i.e. a successful hit with Whirlwind) has been added as a condition to keep the buff active

subsections.searchable_text: Axes Adrenaline Boost (all Axes) Ability damage (i.e. a successful hit with Whirlwind) has been added as a condition to keep the buff active

subsections.heading: Maces

items.text: Deep Leap (One-handed Mace)

subsections.searchable_text: Maces Deep Leap (One-handed Mace) Stun Duration: 2.2s → 1.8s

sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Axes Adrenaline Boost (all Axes) Maces Deep Leap (One-handed Mace)

sections.heading: Faction Warfare Changes

items.text: The Roads of Avalon can no longer be entered while actively flagged for a City Faction
Faction Outposts can no longer be claimed by mounted players
Improved message feedback during Faction Outpost capture

sections.searchable_text: Faction Warfare Changes The Roads of Avalon can no longer be entered while actively flagged for a City Faction Faction Outposts can no longer be claimed by mounted players Improved message feedback during Faction Outpost capture

sections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: PvE Rewards in Lethal Hellgates increased
Elite Dungeons: Avalonian Mages are no longer visible on the minimap

sections.searchable_text: Other Changes PvE Rewards in Lethal Hellgates increased 2v2: +10% 5v5: +20% 10v10: +30% Elite Dungeons: Avalonian Mages are no longer visible on the minimap

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Fixed an issue where the Corrupted Dungeon tutorial popup would appear each time a new dungeon was entered
Fixed an issue where numerous items were displayed on the Destiny Board as unlockable for crafting despite not having crafting requirements

subitems.text: All Royal Armors, Helmets and Shoes

items.text: Fixed a non-functional store button in the Gold Market UI
Fixed an issue where the Average IP displayed incorrectly in the Party Finder
Fixed an issue where Lunging Strike (all Spears) could hit the same enemy twice if the enemy was in the ability's hitbox, left it, and re-entered (the hit is now only applied once per target)
Fixed an issue where the December 2021 Adventurer's Challenge was incorrectly displayed as a past challenge
Additional graphical, audio, UI, and localization fixes
